Travel Guide

Lisbon Family Trip

Lisbon, Portugal · August 1–5, 2026

Summary Getting there Itinerary Stay Activities Dining Budget Weather Packing Tips

📋 Trip Summary

👪 2 adults + 2 kids (5 & 8) ✈️ Flight 🏛️ Museums & History🏖️ Beach🏰 Castle🎤 Science & Aquarium🍽️ Family Dining 💰 €3,144.33

Destination: Lisbon, Portugal (single-base city stay; Costa da Caparica as a beach day trip, not a separate stop)

Dates: Saturday, Aug 1 – Wednesday, Aug 5, 2026 (5 days / 4 nights)

Party: 2 adults + 2 children (ages 5 and 8)

Transport mode: Flight (Warsaw ⇄ Lisbon, nonstop), metro/local transit within Lisbon

Budget: €3,144.33 against a limit of €3,500.00 (UNDER by €355.67)

Interests covered:
  • Museums & History — Lisboa Story Centre, Jerónimos Monastery cloisters, MAAT, and Castelo de São Jorge
  • Beach — a full Costa da Caparica beach day, split into morning and late-afternoon sessions around a shaded midday rest
  • Castle — an early-morning visit to Castelo de São Jorge before the day's heat peaks
  • Science & Aquarium — Oceanário de Lisboa and Pavilhão do Conhecimento, both air-conditioned and child-friendly
  • Family Dining — family-friendly Portuguese and international meals throughout, including vegetarian options at Miolo

✈️ Getting There & Around

Nonstop flights and local connections linking Warsaw, Lisbon, and the Costa da Caparica beach day
Leg Detail Day/Date Duration Est. Cost
Flight (outbound) LOT Polish Airlines nonstop, Warsaw Chopin (WAW) → Lisbon Humberto Delgado (LIS) Day 1 — Sat, Aug 1, 2026 ~3h30m €800.00 (round trip, party of 4)
Airport transfer (arrival) Metro Red Line, airport → central hotel (Baixa/Chiado) Day 1 — Sat, Aug 1, 2026 ~25–30 min €15.20 total (both transfers, party of 4)
Ferry + bus (beach day) Ferry (Cais do Sodré → Cacilhas) + TST bus (Cacilhas → Costa da Caparica), round trip Day 3 — Mon, Aug 3, 2026 Round trip €32.80
Airport transfer (departure) Metro Red Line, central hotel → airport Day 5 — Wed, Aug 5, 2026 ~25–30 min (included above)
Flight (return) LOT Polish Airlines nonstop, Lisbon (LIS) → Warsaw Chopin (WAW) Day 5 — Wed, Aug 5, 2026 ~3h30m (included above)

Local transport

  • Navegante 24-hour pass — general sightseeing days (2 days) — €58.00
  • Navegante 24-hour pass incl. CP suburban trains — if used for a suburban rail day — €45.60
  • Ferry + TST bus — Costa da Caparica beach day, round trip — €32.80
  • Taxi / Uber / Bolt — backup for heat/comfort — €30.00 (contingency, 2 trips)
Transport subtotal used in budget: €981.60 (flights €800.00 + airport transfers €15.20 + local passes/ferry-bus €136.40 + taxi contingency €30.00)

🗓️ Day-by-Day Itinerary

Day 1 — Sat, Aug 1, 2026 — Lisbon (arrival day, 27°C, windy)

  • TransportLOT Polish Airlines nonstop, Warsaw Chopin (WAW) → Lisbon Humberto Delgado (LIS), morning departure, ~3h30m flight time.
  • TransportMetro Red Line from the airport to the central hotel area (Baixa/Chiado), ~25–30 min.
  • ActivityLisboa Story Centre — indoor, air-conditioned multimedia history exhibit (~1–1.5h).
  • ActivityPraça do Comércio — riverside square, evening stroll (~45 min), free.
  • DiningTime Out Market Lisboa for dinner (indoor, climate-controlled food hall, good for a jet-lagged arrival evening); optional quick bite at O Trevo for a bifana sandwich near Praça do Comércio.
  • OvernightNH Collection Lisboa Liberdade — Family Interconnecting Room

Day 2 — Sun, Aug 2, 2026 — Lisbon / Belém (26°C, windy, shaded sightseeing)

  • TransportShort travel within Lisbon to the Belém district (local transport per Getting There & Around).
  • ActivityJerónimos Monastery cloisters — shaded stone cloisters (~1.5h), scheduled late morning to avoid midday heat.
  • ActivityMAAT (Museum of Art, Architecture and Technology) — fully air-conditioned, wheelchair-accessible (~1.5–2h).
  • DiningBrunch/lunch at Miolo (5-minute walk from Jerónimos, vegetarian options available); pastel de nata stop at Pastéis de Belém; dinner at A Vela, a short walk from MAAT.
  • OvernightNH Collection Lisboa Liberdade — Family Interconnecting Room

Day 3 — Mon, Aug 3, 2026 — Costa da Caparica beach day trip (29°C, warming)

  • TransportFerry (Cais do Sodré → Cacilhas) + TST bus (Cacilhas → Costa da Caparica), round trip.
  • 9:00–10:30Costa da Caparica beach — morning session (~1.5h, lifeguarded family beach).
  • 11:00–14:00Midday shade break at a beachfront café/promenade (~3h) to honor the strict midday heat-avoidance window.
  • 17:00–19:00Costa da Caparica beach — late-afternoon session (~2h).
  • DiningLunch at Restaurante Cabana do Pescador (beachfront, family-run since 1974, entertaining parrots/macaws); alternative treat option: Marisqueira Sotavento.
  • OvernightNH Collection Lisboa Liberdade — Family Interconnecting Room

Day 4 — Tue, Aug 4, 2026 — Lisbon / Parque das Nações (35°C, peak heat, indoor/AC day)

  • TransportLocal transit to Parque das Nações.
  • ActivityOceanário de Lisboa — fully air-conditioned aquarium, largely flat single-level circuit (~2–2.5h).
  • ActivityPavilhão do Conhecimento (Ciência Viva science museum) — hands-on interactive exhibits for ages 5–8, air-conditioned (~1.5h).
  • DiningLunch at Nova Peixaria (casual fish bar); dinner at Nova Cervejaria, indoor AC dining room, a short walk from the Oceanário/Pavilhão.
  • OvernightNH Collection Lisboa Liberdade — Family Interconnecting Room

Day 5 — Wed, Aug 5, 2026 — Lisbon (36°C, peak heat, departure day)

  • 9:00–10:30Castelo de São Jorge — early-morning visit (~1.5h), shaded battlement walkways, before the day's heat peaks.
  • RestRemainder of the day is unscheduled hotel rest/packing time ahead of the airport transfer (no additional bookable attraction).
  • DiningLunch/early dinner at Pizzaria Lisboa @ Bairro do Avillez (indoor dining, short ride from the castle), before heading to the airport.
  • TransportMetro Red Line from the central hotel to Lisbon Humberto Delgado Airport (~25–30 min), then LOT Polish Airlines nonstop return, Lisbon (LIS) → Warsaw Chopin (WAW), afternoon/evening, ~3h30m flight time.

🏠 Where You're Staying

Stop Property Stars Key Features Cost/night × Nights Subtotal
Lisbon NH Collection Lisboa Liberdade — Family Interconnecting Room (room details) 4-star 40 m² Family Interconnecting Room (1 double + 2 twin beds), rooftop seasonal outdoor pool, full AC, on Avenida da Liberdade — one metro stop from the Baixa/Chiado core. €320.00 × 4 nights €1,280.00
Accommodation total €1,280.00

🌤️ Weather

Dry the entire trip (0 mm rain forecast every day); heat and sun exposure — not rain — are the dominant concern, intensifying sharply on Days 4–5. Wind on Days 1–2 argues for a light layer despite the warm temperatures.

Day/Date Conditions High / Low Precip. chance
Day 1 — Sat, Aug 1, 2026☀️ Warm, sunny, windy (~30 km/h)27°C / 18°C0 mm
Day 2 — Sun, Aug 2, 2026☀️ Warm, dry, still windy (~29 km/h)26°C / 17°C0 mm
Day 3 — Mon, Aug 3, 2026☀️ Warming trend, moderate wind (~24 km/h)29°C / 18°C0 mm
Day 4 — Tue, Aug 4, 2026☀️ Hot, summer peak heat, light-moderate wind (~19 km/h)35°C / 19°C0 mm
Day 5 — Wed, Aug 5, 2026☀️ Peak heat, hottest day of the trip, light wind (~10 km/h)36°C / 21°C0 mm
Heat advisory: Days 4 and 5 are the hottest of the trip (35–36°C) — indoor/air-conditioned activities are scheduled through the midday hours, with hydration, electrolytes, and high-SPF sunscreen recommended throughout.
Wind note: Wind on Days 1–2 (~29–30 km/h) argues for a light layer despite the warm temperatures.

💡 Travel Tips

  • Pacing preference: The traveler's "minimal walking due to summer heat" is treated as a pacing/comfort preference, not a mobility or disability need — no formal accessibility accommodations were required, though MAAT is noted as wheelchair-accessible.
  • Dietary needs: No dietary restrictions were stated for the party; all restaurant picks are standard omnivore Portuguese/international menus, with Miolo additionally offering vegetarian options.
  • Peak heat days: Days 4 and 5 are the hottest of the trip (35–36°C) — indoor/air-conditioned activities are scheduled through the midday hours, with hydration, electrolytes, and high-SPF sunscreen recommended throughout.
  • Beach day pacing: The Day 3 beach outing is split into a morning and a late-afternoon session bracketing a shaded midday rest, to avoid the 11am–4pm heat window.
  • Free child entry: Jerónimos Monastery and Castelo de São Jorge offer free entry for children up to age 12, so both children (ages 5 and 8) enter free at these venues.
  • Currency: All costs throughout are quoted in EUR, the confirmed trip currency — no currency conversion required.
  • Estimates to reconfirm: Flight fares, the nightly hotel rate, and several restaurant per-person prices are planning-stage estimates and should be re-confirmed closer to booking.
